properties.name: Rejection Rate
properties.description: Percentage of task submissions that are rejected. High rejection rate indicates agent quality issues or unclear acceptance criteria.

properties.name: Avg Task Completion Time
properties.description: Average wall-clock time from task creation to task completion. Includes agent processing time plus any blocked/waiting time.

properties.name: Token Cost Per Task
properties.description: Average number of tokens consumed per task across all runs including retries and experiments.

properties.name: Task Reopen Rate
properties.description: Percentage of tasks that are sent back after initial completion (reopened by orchestrator or human review).

properties.name: Orchestrator Plan Approval Rate
properties.description: Fraction of orchestrator plan presentations that receive human approval on first submission.

properties.name: Janitor Proposal Approval Rate
properties.description: Fraction of janitor structural proposals that receive human approval.

properties.name: Research Pool Rejection Rate
properties.description: Rejection rate for tasks handled by the research agent pool.

properties.name: Coding Pool Rejection Rate
properties.description: Rejection rate for tasks handled by the coding agent pool.

properties.name: Review Pool Rejection Rate
properties.description: Rate at which reviewer outputs are overridden or flagged as insufficient by humans or orchestrators.

properties.name: Coding Pool Token Cost
properties.description: Average tokens per coding task — coding tasks are expected to be more expensive than research.
